behavior_summary: This script collection implements a set of ethereal/spell utilities for creating visual spell effects, spawning debris/temporary items, summoning minions, teleporting entities, and performing post-spell cleanup.

U8P_ETHRSPEL::func0080 is the primary lightning-style routine: it plays a short incantation, launches the LightningBolt process/effect, and then performs cleanup by clearing in-combat state and resetting activity for an NPC that had the caster as its target (if such an NPC reference is present).
U8P_ETHRSPEL::castEtherealTravel is a high-level wrapper that announces an incantation, launches LightningBolt, and spawns the debris routine (U8P_ETHRSPEL::func0114) as a secondary effect.

U8P_ETHRSPEL::func0114 repeatedly attempts to create/hurl temporary items at randomized offsets around a base object (used to create scattered visual debris) with pacing via short spawned timer processes.

U8P_ETHRSPEL::func0225 is a complex summon/attack routine: it optionally prompts the player for a target, resolves coordinates, chooses a creature type randomly, validates placement, creates temporary visual items and animations, creates an NPC with randomized stats, and issues behavior commands (METHOD::func15E7) to make the summoned creature act against the target.

U8P_ETHRSPEL::func0C2D is a targeting/visual helper: it obtains or accepts a target handle, reads its coordinates, spawns and animates temporary items at those coordinates, applies a receiveHit wrapper to the target, and cleans up.

Other helpers implement short audiovisual impact sequences (U8P_ETHRSPEL::func087D, U8P_ETHRSPEL::func0939), teleport/fade sequences (U8P_ETHRSPEL::func0821), and multi-stage orchestrations that combine stasis, SFX, delays and cleanup (U8P_ETHRSPEL::func09DD).
notable_control_flow: Spawn + suspend pattern: many functions spawn short timer processes (FREE::func1C19), suspend to wait for those timers and to pace animations and stage transitions.
Target acquisition uses process target() with suspend-assign; chosen target handles are stored in locals (e.g., local1) and then used to read coordinates via Item::getX/Y/Z.

Randomized choice and retry loops govern debris spawning (U8P_ETHRSPEL::func0114) and summoned NPC stat/type selection (U8P_ETHRSPEL::func0225). Loops are used to animate temporary items by iterating frame indices and suspending between frames.

Context-guarded behavior: many functions branch on caller context ('this' or whether called by player) to decide whether to set avatar stasis, prompt the player, teleport the avatar, or apply different effects.
Post-effect cleanup: several routines check Npc::isInCombat and Npc::getTarget and, when appropriate, call Npc::clrInCombat and spawn Npc::cSetActivity(0) to reset affected NPCs after an effect.
open_questions: Exact calling trigger for each helper: whether these are invoked directly by spells, by enterFastArea/leaveFastArea triggers, or by other higher-level spell systems is inferred but not explicit.
Precise semantics of some numeric/local values (e.g., certain item type ids and exact mapping from random index to creature type in U8P_ETHRSPEL::func0225) are not fully reconstructed.

Whether U8P_ETHRSPEL::func0080 is always run as a process or sometimes called as a synchronous utility (metadata lists process_type 0x0220 but the function is flagged as a utility) — execution form is inferred from spawn/suspend usage.
Exact intended gameplay balance/effects (damage values, spawn counts, stat ranges) beyond the presence of randomization are undetermined from this extraction.
Precise contract and parameters for METHOD::func15E7 and METHOD::func091C (used to command spawned NPCs) are inferred from usage but not fully documented here.

main_function.name: U8P_ETHRSPEL::func0080
main_function.purpose: Produce a short lightning/spell effect (play incantation, launch LightningBolt) and perform post-effect cleanup: if a referenced small-entity handle exists and is an NPC targeting the caster, clear its in-combat state and reset its activity.
entry_conditions: Invoked when the spell/effect is triggered (called_from present in metadata).
Likely bound to a spell-cast event or similar ethereal/spell activation (could be triggered by a player or NPC caster).

function_map.name: U8P_ETHRSPEL::func0080
function_map.role: primary lightning-bolt style effect + post-spell NPC combat cleanup

function_map.name: U8P_ETHRSPEL::func0114
function_map.role: debris/secondary effect spawner — repeatedly legal_create + Item::hurl with pacing

function_map.name: U8P_ETHRSPEL::castEtherealTravel
function_map.role: wrapper/orchestrator: incantation + spawn LightningBolt + spawn U8P_ETHRSPEL::func0114

function_map.name: U8P_ETHRSPEL::func0225
function_map.role: summon/attack routine: optional player targeting, spawn visuals, create NPC minions and command them to attack

function_map.name: U8P_ETHRSPEL::func078C
function_map.role: incantation wrapper that delegates to U8P_ETHRSPEL::func0C2D under certain conditions

function_map.name: U8P_ETHRSPEL::func0821
function_map.role: teleportation wrapper: fade to black, Npc::teleport, fade from black

function_map.name: U8P_ETHRSPEL::func087D
function_map.role: short SFX + LightningBolt + transient item animation impact routine

function_map.name: U8P_ETHRSPEL::func0939
function_map.role: spawn fire visual anchored to an item and then teleport or apply damage depending on context

function_map.name: U8P_ETHRSPEL::func09DD
function_map.role: multi-stage spell orchestration: stasis, UI control, timed SFX/visuals, NPC cleanup and issuing behavior commands

function_map.name: U8P_ETHRSPEL::func0C2D
function_map.role: targeting/selection helper: obtain target, read coords, animate temporary items, apply receiveHit, cleanup

internal_calls.purpose: Launch secondary debris spawner after LightningBolt; provides visual follow-up.
Delegate to the targeting/visual helper when preconditions (caller context and NPC-target checks) hold.
Spawn a short impact helper as part of the multi-stage visual sequence.
Spawn fire visual helper anchored to the affected NPC/item as a later stage in the sequence.

external_calls.purpose: Produce the primary bolt visual/effect for the lightning spell.
Same: launch the bolt effect as the primary visual stage.
Validate whether an item can be created at candidate coordinates before spawning debris.
Create and animate/hurl debris items when legal_create succeeds.
Resolve target/world coordinates for spawn placement.
Create a summoned NPC and initialize randomized stats.
Command the summoned NPC to move/attack/behave toward the target.
Apply a hit/effect to the resolved target after animating temporary items.
Play sound accompaniment for the impact/visual sequence.
Move the relevant NPC/avatar to fixed coordinates as part of a teleport spell with fade visuals.
Spawn a fire visual/effect at computed world coordinates anchored to an item.
Spawn short timers/delays used for sequencing animation and waits between stages.
Create and animate temporary visual items that precede NPC creation and placement.
Detect and clear an NPC's combat state if it was targeting the caster, then reset its activity (post-spell housekeeping).
Validate or adjust spawn elevation/placement before creating NPCs or items.
Play fire-spell sound effect in certain player-targeted branches.
Request a target from the player/engine when invoked by player context (suspend-assign into local1).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script collection implements a set of ethereal/spell utilities for creating visual spell effects, spawning debris/temporary items, summoning minions, teleporting entities, and performing post-spell cleanup.
